MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PUNCH LINE, DAMIEN ARREDONDO, LIVE NATION WORLDWIDE, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS AND PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE AND EXEMPLARY DAMAGES AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES FROM PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Defendants Live Nation Worldwide, Inc., Punch Line and Damien Hernandez's motion to strike the allegations and prayer for punitive damages and for attorney's fees from the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff Miranda Devlin is granted without prejudice to Ms. Develin filing a motion for leave to seek punitive damages in the event she is able to obtain facts which support her doing so. The court cannot consider Ms. Devlin's request for leave to amend to substitute the name of an estate for a now deceased defendant made in opposition papers, but encourages Ms. Devlin to seek a stipulation allowing her to do so and, failing that, she may make her request in an ex parte application.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
